basics.description: Install **Cortex** into your subscription. The reconciler runs in your own tenant, converges your entitled agents in Microsoft Foundry, and heartbeats status back to the Cortex control plane. Your data, models, and agents never leave your subscription.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for the reconciler resources.

basics.name: controlPlaneUrl
basics.label: Cortex control-plane URL
basics.toolTip: The Cortex control-plane base URL from your enrollment.

basics.name: cortexApiScope
basics.label: Cortex API scope
basics.toolTip: The Entra scope for the Cortex control-plane API, from your enrollment. Pre-filled — you rarely need to change it. The reconciler's managed identity requests a token for this scope; Cortex maps the token's tenant to your organization.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter the Cortex API scope (api://… or https://…).

basics.name: tenantName
basics.label: Organization name
basics.toolTip: Your organization's display name, shown in the Cortex fleet.
